Observed facility with insufficient Cold-Water. Location: Three-compartment sink Manner: Three-compartment sink only allows extreme hot water at 140 °F. Which is causing employees to have to let water cool down in order to utilize safely to wash dishware. Also, quat sanitizer is being mixed with only hot water which may affect the quaternary ammonium sanitizers effectiveness to properly clean and sanitize. Cold-Water is having to be gathered from hand washing sink.

Observed food employee not wash hands when required. Condition: Employees had not washed hands the entire time inspection was being completed. Employees cashiering than preparing drinks without washing hands. Line cooks donning new gloves without washing hands prior. Also, line cooks cracking raw eggs to cook then continuing to prepare other sandwiches without washing hands and donning new gloves.
